basis.founded: 2023-2024 [uncertain — recent platform; founders self-describe as 'engineers who trade actively']
basis.target_market: US-equity stock + options retail traders. Heavy options-strategy focus (Iron Condors, Spreads auto-detection). Primarily Interactive Brokers / Schwab / Fidelity / Tasty Trade / Tradovate users. Not for crypto-perp / forex / futures-only traders.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium. Basic: free (1 import source, 3 statement uploads/month, basic stats, automatic spread detection). Pro: $10/mo or $100/yr (save 17%) — unlimited import sources + unlimited statement uploads + Broker Sync + technical/fundamental analysis stats + daily journal + AI insights.

ai_features.feature_name: AI Insights + Automatic Trade Tagging + Smart Option Strategy Detection
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade (automatic tagging based on technical + fundamental analysis; auto-detects option spreads), per-portfolio (AI Insights analyze complete trading history for patterns + recommendations).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Push leaning. AI auto-tags each trade on import (push). AI continuously 'keeps suggesting areas you can improve' (push). User can also view AI Insights on demand (pull).
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Free tier allows AI on minimal data (3 statement uploads/mo). No explicit minimum. [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not disclosed publicly. 'Blazing fast analysis engine processes your data in seconds' — likely custom ML for tagging + LLM for insights. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Auto-applied tags on trades (technical + fundamental classification), AI Insights cards (personalized recommendations), calendar view (weekly performance), comprehensive analytics dashboard, option-strategy groupings.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Inferred prompts (not explicitly published): 'What technical pattern is this trade?' (auto-tag), 'What fundamental factors drove this entry?' (auto-tag), 'Which option strategy did the user execute?' (auto-detect Iron Condor/Spread/etc.), 'What patterns in win/loss does this trader show?' (insights). No public prompt examples documented. [uncertain]

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: tag-only — but with AI auto-tagging based on technical + fundamental analysis (vs user-defined tags). Tag your setups and analyze them. Not a structured-rules / promotion-rule playbook system.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: AI automatically groups trades by detected technical pattern + fundamental setup. Per-setup performance can then be analyzed. Smart Option Strategy Detection groups multi-leg trades automatically — important for options traders.
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: No shared template library. Auto-tagging provides ready-made categorization but not user-installable playbooks. [uncertain]

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted only. Bank-level encryption in transit + at rest. Enterprise-grade cloud infrastructure with regular security audits. No own-API-key option for AI.
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: $10/mo Pro tier ($100/yr). AI Insights included — no separate API surcharge. Cheapest AI-bundled tier in this cohort.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: None. Stocks + options brokers only (Interactive Brokers, Schwab, Fidelity, Tasty Trade, Tradovate). 'We support stocks and options trading on the following brokers'. No crypto/forex/perp.
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Stocks + options (primary). Futures via Tradovate. Complex option strategies (Iron Condors, Spreads) auto-detected — strong options coverage. No crypto/forex.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Smart Option Strategy Detection groups multi-leg trades; for stocks, multi-execution likely consolidated to single trade. Specific multi-TP partial-close analytics not the marketed feature. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Calendar view (weekly performance) + 'Comprehensive Analysis'. Per-setup × per-session not explicitly marketed for stocks (less relevant than for crypto/forex).

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: Approaches deep_pattern_analysis via AI Insights (identifies successful patterns + pitfalls + provides personalized recommendations) but stays at surface_metrics for most dashboards. Best-in-cohort for options-strategy classification.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Not explicitly featured. Focus is technical + fundamental tagging, not emotional state. [uncertain]
coaching_depth.voice_journaling: Not mentioned. Daily Journal feature (Pro) is text-based. [uncertain]

community.community_driven_ai: No shared-AI templates or collective insights model marketed. Per-user analytics.
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Active platform; no public changelog reviewed. Brokers list expanding (users can request new brokers via support). [uncertain on specific AI-feature release cadence]
